ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race/ethnicity of the student */,
  "parental_level_of_education" TEXT /* Parental level of education */,
  "lunch" TEXT /* Lunch status (standard or free/reduced) */,
  "test_preparation_course" TEXT /* Test preparation course taken (none or completed) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the institution */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual graduation date */,
  "current_grade" TEXT /* Current grade level of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Student's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Student's email address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_gender FOREIGN KEY ("gender") REFERENCES genders ("gender_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_parental_level_of_education FOREIGN KEY ("parental_level_of_education") REFERENCES parental_levels_of_education ("parental_level_of_education_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_race_ethnicity FOREIGN KEY ("race_ethnicity") REFERENCES race_ethnicities ("race_ethnicity_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_test_preparation_course FOREIGN KEY ("test_preparation_course") REFERENCES test_preparation_courses ("test_preparation_course_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_lunch FOREIGN KEY ("lunch") REFERENCES lunch_statuses ("lunch_status_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_ethnicities" (
  "race_ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race/ethnicity */,
  "race_ethnicity_name" TEXT /* Name of the race/ethnicity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_ethnicity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parental_levels_of_education" (
  "parental_level_of_education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parental level of education */,
  "parental_level_of_education_name" TEXT /* Name of the parental level of education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parental_level_of_education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lunch_statuses" (
  "lunch_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lunch status */,
  "lunch_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the lunch status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lunch_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_preparation_courses" (
  "test_preparation_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test preparation course */,
  "test_preparation_course_name" TEXT /* Name of the test preparation course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_preparation_course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who achieved the score */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject (math, reading, writing) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was taken */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who graded the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_subject FOREIGN KEY ("subject") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_demographics" (
  "student_demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student demographic */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's gender */,
  "race_ethnicity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's race/ethnicity */,
  "parental_level_of_education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's parental level of education */,
  "lunch_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student's lunch status */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country of origin of the student */,
  "native_language" TEXT /* Native language of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_race_ethnicity_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_ethnicity_id") REFERENCES race_ethnicities ("race_ethnicity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_parental_level_of_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("parental_level_of_education_id") REFERENCES parental_levels_of_education ("parental_level_of_education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_demographics_lunch_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("lunch_status_id") REFERENCES lunch_statuses ("lunch_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_test_preparation_courses" (
  "student_test_preparation_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student test preparation course */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "test_preparation_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test preparation course */,
  "course_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the student started the course */,
  "course_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the student completed the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_test_preparation_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_test_preparation_courses_test_preparation_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_preparation_course_id") REFERENCES test_preparation_courses ("test_preparation_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_test_preparation_courses_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, educator, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_progress" (
  "student_progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student progress entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject (math, reading, writing) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was achieved */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher who recorded the progress */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes on the student's progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_subject FOREIGN KEY ("subject") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_progress_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "at_risk_students" (
  "at_risk_student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each at-risk student entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject (math, reading, writing) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "identification_date" TEXT /* Date when the student was identified as at-risk */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason why the student is identified as at-risk */,
  "intervention_plan" TEXT /* Intervention plan to help the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("at_risk_student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_at_risk_students_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_at_risk_students_subject FOREIGN KEY ("subject") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_preparation_course_effectiveness" (
  "test_preparation_course_effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test preparation course effectiveness entry */,
  "test_preparation_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test preparation course */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject (math, reading, writing) */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score achieved by students who took the course */,
  "effectiveness_date" TEXT /* Date when the effectiveness was measured */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the sample */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the average score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_preparation_course_effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_preparation_course_effectiveness_subject FOREIGN KEY ("subject") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_preparation_course_effectiveness_test_preparation_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_preparation_course_id") REFERENCES test_preparation_courses ("test_preparation_course_id")
)
